target: 5. Funeral
Shinpei Ajiro

Dad!
Shinsuke's back!!
I'm home…

Whoa… Shinpei!!!
You've grown so much…
You've gotten a bit thinner…
We'll talk later… Go see Ushio.
Yeah…

(Alright, let's go.
Fourth funeral…!!)

(Repeating the previous funeral.
Just relying on memory… same movements, same conversation…)

(I have to say it!! To Shiori!!
Be careful of the shadow!!)

( Damn it.
Even though I know it's a shadow, approaching it is just terror…)

(If I say even one line differently,
I have no idea what kind of impact it would have!!)

Shiori!
You saw a girl who looked just like me, right??

Be careful… Maybe that's a shadow monster…
You know about Shadow Sickness, right?

If that girl appears again,
Absolutely don't get close to her…

Today too…
When you're away from your dad and mom…
(It's definitely like that)

(When I didn't copy last time,
It was because I talked to her)

(If I recreate the situation,
Shiori won't attack me…)

(1:00 PM, coffin is loaded into the car
To take it to the crematorium on the mountain…)
Shinpei-kun.
About what I said earlier…
Ah, yes…
(Even though I knew she'd talk to me, I still got startled…)

Shiori saw a shadow…
Did Mio tell you?
Yeah, something like that…

(Theses two…!
Are they in the shadow?!!)

(The two of them are moving
To avoid being stepped on by the ant…)

(It was a shadow!!
How… All three of them…!?)
Shinpei-kun?
Ah… Yes…

When Mio was little,
She said she heard it from her grandma…
Sorry, I said something weird…

That's right…
Yeah, I'm the one who's sorry.

Thank you, Shinpei-kun.
Shiori, let's go.

(The three of them from the Kobayakawa family… Probably the real ones are already…
Can't be saved… No matter what…)

(Where are you, Nagumo-sensei?!
It's getting too late…)

(Hurry!!!
I need to meet Nagumo-sensei as soon as possible!!!)
…Shinsuke. Are you okay?

Huh?
Ah, yeah…

(What the hell… Damn it!
What should I say to Mio…)

(No… Should I even say it?!
It would just give her fear and anxiety…)

(I was just… talking to someone,
I just wanted to feel better myself…?)
("Keep silent and protect" is the best…!!)

…Mio.
Can I ask you something?

You…
What color were your pants yesterday?

Shinsuke!!!
After two years back,
The first thing you ask is… that??

I'm being serious!!!
I really want to know the color of your pants yesterday!!!

Why would you ask that!?
Shinsuke!!!

(When I was killed by Mio in the second loop!!!
I accidentally saw it for a moment…)

(Yes… Mio's pants were white!!!
But the day before, when she fell into the sea on her bike,
Mio's pants were blue stripes!!!)
(From the color of the pants, I might be able to tell when Mio was copied…)
Please… tell me!

Yesterday, I stayed at the funeral home after the wake…
I changed…
Yeah… I definitely wore white…
S-so what??
I… no…

(That means…
Mio was copied yesterday…
During the 21st's wake!!)

(I can't go back to yesterday…
So I can't prevent Mio from being copied…!!)

(I have to "defeat" her…
To protect Mio!!)
(I need to gather information for that…)
(Third funeral…)

(The funeral flow is the same as the previous two…
What should I do here…)
(That's right… Shiori!!)

(Totsumura said…
Tomorrow, the Kobayakawa family will suddenly disappear.
It's definitely the shadow's doing)

(I need to warn them before it's too late…
Be careful of the shadow!!)

Shiori!!
Can I talk to you for a moment?
You saw a girl who looked just like me, right??

Be careful… Maybe that's a shadow monster…
You know about Shadow Sickness, right?

If that girl appears again,
Absolutely don't get close to her…

Today too…
When you're away from your dad and mom…

(I've warned Shiori.
I just hope the disappearance doesn't happen tomorrow…)
(The funeral continued without a hitch after that)

(1:00 PM, coffin is loaded into the car
To take it to the crematorium on the mountain…)
Shinpei-kun.
Shiori's mom…
About what I said earlier…
Ah… Yes…

Shiori saw a shadow…
Did Mio tell you?
Yeah, something like that…

When Mio was little,
She said she heard it from her grandma…
Sorry, I said something weird…

That's right…
Yeah, I'm the one who's sorry.

Thank you, Shinpei-kun.
Shiori, let's go.
…Phew.
(I just hope nothing happens to the Kobayakawa family…)

(It's the same again.
When I was on the ferry earlier,
When Mio was on her bike…)
(Everyone is moving and talking the same as the dream…)

(It's not just deja vu or a prophetic dream…
It's something else)
(I'm reliving July 22nd…)
(Once again…)

(…My head is splitting…
My eyes are burning…)

(What's happening…!?
Ushio…)

(Ushio's body had the Kikugawa line…
Someone had choked her…)
Ushio…
(What really happened…?)
…Huh?
Hey!! Who was that!! Don't take pictures!!

(Another flash…
What is this…!?)

(That's Shiori…
The girl Ushio saved with her life…)

(If time really did rewind…
Then tomorrow that family will disappear…)

(And if this keeps repeating…
That shadow… will really exist?)
(<color=#GF_TIPS_006>Alain</color>… I never thought we'd meet like this)

(My steps feel heavy…
Because I'm not ready to accept it…
But--)
(This is reality…)
Ushio…
(How could I have thought I'd never hear their voice again…)
(This photo… from when I was young…)
(Ten years ago, I lost my parents and was taken in by Alain)
(That's why Ushio was not just a childhood friend but also part of my family)
(The day before I left the island, Ushio said they wanted to eat the curry I made…)
(I… didn't say "I'll make it next time…"…)
(If I'd known this would happen, I should've made the curry they loved)
(There was no "next time"…)
How pitiful… huh…
Shinpei-kun must be hurting too…

By the way, did you hear?
Ushio-chan's body…
(Ushio's body?)
They say Professor Hishigata performed the autopsy.
An autopsy?!
That's really harsh…!!!
(An autopsy… is that something done even in accidents?)
…Huh?

Hey!! Who was that?!
Don't take photos here!!

(…Flash?
Why here…)
Shinpei!! You're finally back!!
(Mio told me… when Ushio died, Sou was nearby and tried desperately to save them)

Ushio… tried to save a drowning child…
Then was swept away and lost consciousness…
Sou…

I did everything I could!
But… it didn't work.
I… I was right there…!!!

I'm sorry, Shinpei!! 
I'm so sorry!!!
Hit me…! 
Hit me as much as you want!!!

(…
Of course, Sou who saw it happen would be the most hurt…)
There's no point in crying…

Plus… if everyone's crying…
I end up staying calm…

S… Shinpei…
I'm so sorry…

Hey, Sou.
Can I ask you something?
Guh… what is it…?

Earlier, one of the attendees said…
Ushio's father performed the autopsy?

Ushio died in a sea accident, right?
Then why the autopsy…?
…Go see that girl.

Huh?
That girl… wasn't she…

Shiori Kobayakawa.
You know, the one from Koba Mart…

Ah!!
You've grown so much…
…That's what I meant earlier. Ushio gave their life to save this Shiori…
So that's how it was…

How pitiful…
She can't even speak from the shock of the accident.
That's terrible…
Shinpei-kun.
Ah, Karikiri-san…
(The priest of the Hitogashima Shrine who oversees the island's rituals)

It's time for the coffin to be carried out.
Shinpei-kun… will you help me?
…Yes.

I'll call you again tonight.
We'll talk about it then…
Ah…
